/opt/ls_2k0300_env/loongson-gnu-toolchain-8.3-x86_64-loongarch64-linux-gnu-rc1.6/bin/loongarch64-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 -march=loongarch64 -mtune=loongarch64 -fPIC -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -pthread -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-placement-new  -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/steering_media_selftest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/platform/steering_media_link.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/platform/steering_media_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/platform/true_ls2k0300/steering_media_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_debug_reporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/control_decision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/motion_supervisor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/steering_media_selftest.dir/home/madejuele/projects/2K0300/new/code/runtime/steering_media_service.cpp.o -o steering_media_selftest  -lpthread -lm
